vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore
5kg payload, 600mm reach
Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

risk.mit: Increase access cuts and ensure serviceability of all critical areas.

risk.desc: Threaded connections into printed or soft material may lack adequate engagement depth.
risk.mit: Ensure threaded connections into printed or soft material use inserts or bosses with adequate engagement depth.

risk.desc: Bearing dummies may float in links with no seat, shoulder, retaining ring groove, or axial location scheme.
risk.mit: Each joint should show a bearing seat with shoulder or retaining feature, shaft locating geometry, and stated fit intent for inner/outer races.

risk.desc: Harnesses crossing joints may lack slack loops, strain relief at both ends, and routing that avoids pinch points through the full motion range.
risk.mit: Ensure harnesses crossing joints have slack loops, strain relief at both ends, and routing that avoids pinch points through the full motion range.

risk.desc: Joint cartridges may be fused into structural links, making them non-replaceable.
risk.mit: Ensure joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links.

risk.desc: Fastener patterns may not match load direction, leading to potential failure.
risk.mit: Ensure fastener patterns match load direction and include locking methods.

generated_parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
generated_parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

requirements: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels
Replaceable motor modules per joint with fastener access
Motor_module, fastener_access, coupling_dummy must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops
Good: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
Good: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Good: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Good: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Good: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Good: J1-J6 axis rings, reducer/bearing dummies, encoder covers, and tool flange datum are visible
Good: Cable spine clips externally or remains inspectable through open channels
Good: Joint cartridges can be removed without cutting printed links
Good: Each joint shows a bearing seat with shoulder or retaining feature, shaft locating geometry, and stated fit intent for inner/outer races
Good: Harness crossing each joint has slack loop, strain relief at both ends, and routing that avoids pinch points through the full motion range
